summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Doctify ClinixAI. All 14 backend tests passed 100%. Frontend registration flow and navigation to Voice Consultation works. Doctor Dashboard sidebar navigation could not be verified via Playwright (possible selector/timing issue), but DoctorDashboard component and API are confirmed working.

ui_bugs.issue: Doctor Dashboard navigation via sidebar click could not be verified in Playwright — clicking 'Doctor' nav item from Voice Consultation screen appears to not change screen (test fell back to Register screen). This may be a Playwright selector matching issue rather than a real bug, but warrants manual verification.

issues: Minor CSS console warning: mixing shorthand 'border' and non-shorthand 'borderColor' properties causes a React style conflict (non-blocking)

action_items: Manually verify Doctor Dashboard sidebar navigation from Voice Consultation screen works correctly
Add data-testid attributes to nav items, form inputs, and key dashboard elements to improve Playwright testability
critical_code_review_comments: No data-testid attributes on any interactive elements — makes automated testing brittle
api.js has fallback to localhost:8001 which should not be needed in production (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is always set)
NavItem lock condition only covers 'consult' and 'doctor' tabs — Pharmacy/Lab/Status tabs are accessible without a patient registered, though they require patient_id to function

success_rate.frontend: 80% (registration + consult navigation confirmed; doctor dashboard nav unverified)

seed_data_creation: Several TEST_ patients registered during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend all green. AI pipeline (Groq) is connected and returning real structured medical records. Frontend Register → Voice Consultation flow works. Doctor Dashboard nav click from sidebar needs manual check. No data-testid attrs on any elements.
rca_of_issue: Doctor Dashboard sidebar nav click failure in Playwright: NavItem button has opacity:0.4 and cursor:not-allowed when locked (no patient). After registration patientId IS set in React state, but Playwright's locator('nav').get_by_text('Doctor').click() may be matching an element before state update completes, or the VoiceConsultation screen may have DOM structure interfering. Mitigation: add data-testid='nav-doctor' to the Doctor NavItem button.
